 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75746551</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Gaza: Rafah crossing reopens, ceasefire's second phase starts]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-01T10:15:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-01T10:15:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/gaza-rafah-crossing-reopens-ceasefire-s-second-phase-starts/a-75746551?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[People will be allowed through the Gaza Strip's only crossing with a country other than Israel. Thousands are waiting to leave the enclave for medical treatment, the local health authority said.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75746046</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Iran updates: Iran classes EU armies as terrorist groups]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-01T08:48:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-01T08:48:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/iran-updates-iran-classes-eu-armies-as-terrorist-groups/live-75746046?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[In a tit-for-tat move, Iran has said it now considers EU militaries to be terrorist organizations. The Iranian president has called for tensions with Washington to be resolved diplomatically. DW has more.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75733074</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany: Afghanistan's consulates pose threat to refugees]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-01T08:31:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-01T08:31:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-afghanistan-s-consulates-pose-threat-to-refugees/a-75733074?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Afghanistan's consulates in Germany are being taken over by Taliban officials, putting Afghani people at the mercy of the regime they fled.]]></summary>
  <category term="Germany"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75744757</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Let them eat steak? Experts roast inverted US food pyramid]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-01T07:33:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-01T07:33:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/let-them-eat-steak-experts-roast-inverted-us-food-pyramid/a-75744757?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The United States has introduced a new food pyramid with significantly more meat, dairy and fat. Health and sustainability experts are alarmed.]]></summary>
  <category term="Health"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75729580</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Philippines: Are terror laws being used to silence critics?]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-01T06:04:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-01T06:04:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/philippines-are-terror-laws-being-used-to-silence-critics/a-75729580?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Journalist Frenchie Mae Cumpio's conviction on terror-financing charges has raised concerns over press freedoms in the Philippines, where activists warn that anti-terror laws are being wielded to clamp down on dissent.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75745522</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Iran hints at progress toward negotiations with US]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-01T04:37:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-01T04:37:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/iran-hints-at-progress-toward-negotiations-with-us/a-75745522?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[US President Donald Trump also said there was contact between Washington and Tehran. It comes as the US has deployed several warships off the Iranian coast.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75745526</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Epstein files: UK PM Starmer says ex-prince Andrew should testify in US]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-01T03:51:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-01T03:51:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/epstein-files-uk-pm-starmer-says-ex-prince-andrew-should-testify-in-us/a-75745526?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A new batch of Epstein files has ratcheted up the heat on Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor over his links with the pedophile financier. Now, the British PM says the former prince should testify in the US Congress.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75745389</id>
  <title><![CDATA[New US envoy arrives in Venezuela after Maduro's ouster]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-01T01:03:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-01T01:03:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/new-us-envoy-arrives-in-venezuela-after-maduro-s-ouster/a-75745389?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The arrival of charge d'affaires Laura Dogu comes one month after US forces kidnapped leader Nicolas Maduro and brought him to New York to face trial. Dogu is a veteran diplomat and Spanish speaker.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75745175</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Liam Ramos: Judge orders release of 5-year-old ICE detainee]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T23:36:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T23:36:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/liam-ramos-judge-orders-release-of-5-year-old-ice-detainee/a-75745175?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The boy and his father had been detained by US immigration agents during a Minneapolis raid earlier this month. An image of the boy during the raid sparked outrage and brought a defense from US Vice President JD Vance.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75738990</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany news: Defense minister says US needs Europe]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T20:54:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T20:54:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-news-defense-minister-says-us-needs-europe/live-75738990?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Pistorius has stressed that the US needs Europe just as much as Europe needs the US. Meanwhile, recent research figures show that about one in two Germans will develop cancer in their lifetime. DW has more.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75723552</id>
  <title><![CDATA[The hidden money behind deep-sea mining]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T20:40:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T20:40:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/the-hidden-money-behind-deep-sea-mining/a-75723552?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A DW investigation traces the hidden financial web behind deep-sea mining — an industry scientists say remains poorly understood, yet capable of causing irreversible harm to oceans worldwide.]]></summary>
  <category term="Environment"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75717969</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Belarus: Snow and cold used to torture political prisoners]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T19:57:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T19:57:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/belarus-snow-and-cold-used-to-torture-political-prisoners/a-75717969?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Former political prisoners tell DW that winter in Belarus prisons is brutal during cold, snowy winters like this one — because snow and freezing temperatures are used by guards to torment them.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75742841</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Israeli strikes kill more than 30 Palestinians in Gaza]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T17:47:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T17:47:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/israeli-strikes-kill-more-than-30-palestinians-in-gaza/a-75742841?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A wave of strikes hit different locations across Gaza, including apartments and tents, a day before the Rafah border is set to reopen.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75681267</id>
  <title><![CDATA[An undying trend: How vampires like those in 'Sinners' hold a mirror to society]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T17:35:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T17:35:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/an-undying-trend-how-vampires-like-those-in-sinners-hold-a-mirror-to-society/a-75681267?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[As the horror movie "Sinners" stands poised to sweep the Oscars, we take a look at how and why the vampire genre has long captivated audiences — from folklore to film. Is this trend truly immortal?]]></summary>
  <category term="Culture"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75743471</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Goma under rebel control: Life in the shadow of violence]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T17:20:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T17:20:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/goma-under-rebel-control-life-in-the-shadow-of-violence/a-75743471?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[One year after M23 rebels captured Goma, residents of the city in the Democratic Republic of Congo are looking for ways to cope with the trauma.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75744123</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Italy church restoration probed after Meloni angel lookalike]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T17:17:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T17:17:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/italy-church-restoration-probed-after-meloni-angel-lookalike/a-75744123?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Many have noted a striking resemblance between the face of an angel in a restored church in Rome and that of Italy's prime minister. "No, decidedly I do not resemble an angel," Giorgia Meloni has said.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75742882</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Denmark: Thousands take part in veteran anti-Trump protest]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T15:50:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T15:50:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/denmark-thousands-take-part-in-veteran-anti-trump-protest/a-75742882?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The silent march to the US embassy in Copenhagen came after Donald Trump belittled NATO's role in the Afghanistan war. Tensions remain high between the two NATO allies amid Trump's push to acquire Greenland.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75740142</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Iran: 1 killed after explosion hit Bandar Abbas Port]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T13:09:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T13:09:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/iran-1-killed-after-explosion-hit-bandar-abbas-port/a-75740142?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The blast in the Iranian city of Bandar Abbas comes amid heightened US-Iran tensions. State media has attributed the incident to a gas leak.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75731780</id>
  <title><![CDATA[US eyes Red Sea as state envoy visits Africa]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T11:19:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T11:19:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/us-eyes-red-sea-as-state-envoy-visits-africa/a-75731780?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Washington has said a visit by Deputy Secretary of State Christopher Landau to Africa aims to strengthen bilateral ties, but the timing raises questions about the US's interests in the Red Sea corridor.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75738787</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Massive outage knocks out power across Ukraine, Moldova]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T10:49:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T10:49:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/massive-outage-knocks-out-power-across-ukraine-moldova/a-75738787?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Disruptions to Ukraine's power grid have led to outages there and in neighboring Moldova. Kyiv's metro and water supply have both been affected.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75725834</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany's AfD bonds with Austrian far-right extremists]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-31T10:14:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-31T10:14:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-s-afd-bonds-with-austrian-far-right-extremists/a-75725834?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Officials from the far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) party have been openly rubbing shoulders with Austrian right-wing extremist Martin Sellner. This, despite reservations over his Identitarian Movement.]]></summary>
  <category term="Germany"/>
 </entry>
</feed>
